010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027
028/**
029 * A list of {@link EntityTag} beans.
030 */
031public class EntityTags {
032
033   /** Represents an empty entity tags object. */
034   public static final EntityTags EMPTY = new EntityTags("");
035
036   private static final Cache<String,EntityTags> CACHE = Cache.of(String.class, EntityTags.class).build();
037
038   /**
039    * Returns a parsed entity tags header value.
040    *
041    * @param value The header value.
042    * @return A parsed header value.
043    */
044   public static EntityTags of(EntityTag...value) {
045      return value == null ? null : new EntityTags(value);
046   }
047
048   /**
049    * Returns a parsed entity tags header value.
050    *
051    * @param value The raw header value.
052    * @return A parsed header value.
053    */
054   public static EntityTags of(String value) {
055      return isEmpty(value) ? EMPTY : CACHE.get(value, () -> new EntityTags(value));
056   }
057
058   private final EntityTag[] value;
059   private final String string;
060
061   /**
062    * Constructor.
063    *
064    * @param value The header value.
065    */
066   public EntityTags(EntityTag...value) {
067      this.string = join(value, ", ");
068      this.value = copyOf(value);
069   }
070
071   /**
072    * Constructor.
073    *
074    * @param value The header value.
075    */
076   public EntityTags(String value) {
077      string = value;
078      this.value = parse(value);
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Returns the entity tags in this object as an array.
083    *
084    * <p>
085    * Returns a copy of the entity tags.
086    *
087    * @return The entity tags in this object as an array.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
088    */
089   public EntityTag[] toArray() {
090      return copyOf(value);
091   }
092
093   /**
094    * Returns the entity tags in this object as a list.
095    *
096    * <p>
097    * Returns an unmodifiable list.
098    *
099    * @return The entity tags in this object as a list.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
100    */
101   public List<EntityTag> toList() {
102      return u(l(value));
103   }
104
105   @Override
106   public boolean equals(Object o) {
107      return o instanceof EntityTags other && eq(this, other, (x, y) -> Arrays.equals(x.value, y.value));
108   }
109
110   @Override
111   public int hashCode() {
112      return Arrays.hashCode(value);
113   }
114
115   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
116   public String toString() {
117      return string;
118   }
119
120   private static EntityTag[] parse(String value) {
121      if (value == null)
122         return new EntityTag[0];
123      var s = splita(value);
124      var v = new EntityTag[s.length];
125      for (var i = 0; i < s.length; i++)
126         v[i] = EntityTag.of(s[i]);
127      return v;
128   }
129}
